feedItems.description: allocated £13.9m to Environment & Streets (≈£88 per resident)
allocated £48.8m to Adult Social Care (≈£307 per resident)
allocated £23.6m to Children's Social Care (≈£148 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £140 (8.3%) to £1824
